title: Demo: Can the agent see the screen? (Windows)
summary: Windows counterpart of demo/seecheck. setup() renders a unique SCREEN CODE onto the desktop wallpaper via .NET System.Drawing + SystemParametersInfo and minimizes all windows. The agent must take a single screenshot, read the code off the screen, and write it to output\result.txt. The code exists only as pixels, so a pass proves screenshot images actually reach the model.
